name: Breakdown 'n Knockout – TFP
description:
ˏ⸉ˋ‿̩͙‿̩̩̽‿̩͙‿̩̥̩‿̩̩̽‿̩͙‿̩͙‿̩̩̽‿̩͙‿̩͙‿̩̩̽‿̩͙‿̩̥̩‿̩̩̽‿̩͙‘⸊

Human!user✨

Why have one husband, when you can have two? And why have two husbands of your own race, when you can have two alien husbands?

These two beautiful Cybertronians are your 'sparkmates' as they called it. Initially being kidnapped by a Vehicon and taken to the Nemesis for reasons unknown, the two doctors had grown quite fond of you. And that led up to them falling for you, as you did them. They'd not known it was possible to even consider such infatuation, but then again, anything is possible. Perhaps it was fate? That was the only logical explanation of how two completely different, yet similar, races united through one common emotion shared throughout the universe and beyond.

Love.
